title: Trending Niche Content Creation Agent
promptText: Give me 20 tweet ideas based on the trending topics in my niche: [your niche]. Make them fresh, bold, and optimized for high engagement. Use a mix of: 1. The 'Before/After' contrast, 2. The 'Underrated Tip', 3. The 'Controversial Opinion'. Ensure each includes a strong hook and a call to action.
